description: Plugin-distributed hooks for data-science-research. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags mechanically-detectable analysis anti-patterns (a scaler/encoder fit before train_test_split — leakage; a modeling script with a single split and no cross-validation; a model script with no random seed set). Set DS_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
